column1: Ceddanne Rafaela leads the way with a strong track record of consistency, hitting safely in nearly 74% of games and showing a recent uptick at the plate. He draws a favorable matchup in Colorado’s hitter-friendly environment, making him a reliable pick. Shohei Ohtani offers similar upside with a platoon advantage, though his recent form lags behind. Alec Burleson and Freddie Freeman also bring steady profiles, but Rafaela stands out for Beat The Streak lineups today.
